stats.detector_rule: English-like if repaired text has at least 8 alphabetic chars, ASCII-letter ratio >= 0.86, at least 3 normalized tokens, and either 2 common English marker hits, or 1 marker plus 1 hotel-domain hit, or 2 hotel-domain hits with ASCII ratio >= 0.94.

sample_kept.review: The staff were very kind and helpful. The dog was also a sweetheart. The water pressure in the shower was weak. The bed mat was also hard, so it was hard for me to sleep.
Location is superb, indoor decor with live plants top notch, trained staff, very good cook. Luxurious experience all the way. -
smelly roomaccess going to the room is a bit hard. especially when its raining helpful staff

sample_rejected.review: Rất thích đệm và giường tại hhostels vì rất êm và cũng private. Địa điểm gần trung tâm mộc và các điểm checkin đẹp khác ở mộc châu. Nhà hàng thuộc A Pao ngay kế bên, đồ ăn rất ngon
Chỗ ở sạch sẽ, ấm cúng. Chị chủ rất nhiệt tình và chu đáo.
Gọi điện và nhắn tin hỏi nhà nghỉ thái độ rất kém

overall.rouge_note: ROUGE-1/2/L from the SemAE paper requires human gold summaries; this CSV has reviews only, so this trial reports image-formula CEC/ASC instead.
overall.scoring_note: unique_opinions and cluster_weight are counted on the whole input; summary/CEC/ASC use a capped representative evidence set per aspect.

The Home trek from Sapa town to the homestay was the highlight of our stay, and it was an unforgettable experience for our family.

The room is the best I had in my trip to Vietnam very clean and very big and the bed super comfortable and not expensive at all The offer Dinner and breakfast and it's one of the best I had in Vietnam If you want to have one of the best staying in cao bang come here

The breakfast was amazing.

The room was comfortable and clean.
The room was clean and comfortable.

the restaurant itself is also very very basic.- my dad wanted a coffee at 10 PM but there was no coffee available which is just a case of making a pot so it’s just ridiculous - the towels we received had holes in them - there is mold on the roofs in the bathroom - there was construction going on on the first day we were there which was very noisy and went on till 10 PM- the second day there was a school tour with local children who terrorized the area and pool (literally scared guests away from relaxing there) and they did not communicate this visit from them with us- the last day there was some dirt in the pool which they were cleaning but we could not use the pool and again no communication at all while we were literally sitting at the pool- breakfast is okay but very minimal and the same every day Even tough we told almost all of this to the reception employee, there was nothing they did to make our stay better or to change the broken beds or towels etc.

The place is exactly as you see it in pictures and better a really captivating scenery with an outstanding cleaning services our room was very nice especially the view and the size of it and the bathroom The staff were nice enough to store our luggage until check in time Staff at the front desk at the beginning were helpful but in time I saw that they overcharged when requesting taxi for us which happened several times and we had to wait till last day for them to provide electric plug to use our devices and when we asked for laundry to be done they waited till check out time to tell us they forgot to do it We also were surprised by charges of snacks in the room which we thought Complimentaries since there were no menu, tags, or signs of the price Lastly the breakfast buffet is not worth including in the package you get because it is very limited and sometimes not fresh

They have a lovely room, the staff is very friendly, it is very clean, and the food is also very good, the view that you can enjoy from the top is spectacular Taking into account that it is a 5-star hotel, there are some details to improve, no one in the hotel explained to me where everything was located, such as the restaurant, the game room, I discovered it myself, the hotel knew that we were three people and the room did not have things for three people, the game room has devices that do not work, not all the staff speak English, in general I liked it a lot but these details should be improved, thank you
It was clean in a convenient location and the staff was very friendly.
The bar next to the pool is very convenient, the room is very comfortable, the price was a great value, and the staff are very friendly.

-the location -the place is new so it looks super nice and fancy -they offer you all the services you might need in cat ba such as tours, laundry, taxi, transport to Hanoi, motorbike rental, etc -the room is nice and looked clean -we request to leave the room a little bit after the check out and it was no problem at all -no soap at the bathroom -no one either in the reception or the breakfast spoke a small word of English so you have to use translate for everything -we rent motorcycle and they gave me one with no gasoline at all, we went and charge it, it didn’t work, (took us one hour) next day we change it, no gas again, went to charged it (took us another hour again) -breakfast is one of the worst that I had in hotels in my hole life and in all of Southeast Asia, looks like the place is new and there are a lot of things to improve.

sample_kept.review: Really nice style, the bed was very comfortable. The staff was extremely kind! We will definitely be back, thank you 🙏🏼

Great location. Walking distance from the center, but quiet, apart from frog singing, which we found funny.
Good view to the rice paddies especially enjoyable from the hot tube on the balcony. We had to wait cc 20 min for card payment because the receptionist had to go to another place to get it. We were on our way to the airport, do it made us slightly worried.

Beautiful hotel with lovely decor. The staff are the most friendly and helpful. Room is beautiful and clean. The bed is super comfy. The shower is one of the best we’ve had at any hotel room. Breakfast is also delicious. It has everything we needed to be comfortable.

sample_rejected.review: Khách sạn mới, nhân viên nhiệt tình cực kỳ

Công ty mình nghỉ 2 ngày 1 đêm vào dịp nghỉ tết và có một thời gian rất thoải mái ở đây. Cơ sở hạ tầng rất đẹp, phòng ốc đúng như mô tả và rất sạch sẽ. Vị trí của villa nằm hơi xa so với các khách sạn khác nhưng vẫn gần các địa điểm du lịch Tam Cốc
Vào buổi tối, khuôn viên của villa khá đẹp, bể bơi và đèn được bài trí rất thư giãn và yên tĩnh.

Quản lý và lễ tân có tác phong làm việc ân cần và chu đáo. Hỗ trợ đoàn mình nhận phòng sớm vì đoàn tới sớm hơn giờ check in

Thời gian lưu trú ngắn nhưng gia đình tôi rất hài lòng với điều kiện cơ sở vật chất, và cách ứng xử chuyên nghiệp, tận tâm của quản lý villa. Rất recommend mọi người và nếu có dịp trở lại Ninh Bình, đây là một địa điểm tôi vẫn lựa chọn. Villa khi đi đang trong thời gian đầu vận hành nên còn vài thiếu xót nhỏ trong công tác dịch vụ nhưng chấp nhận được.
Bữa sáng ngon, nhân viên thân thiện

We liked the location it's within easy walking distance to the beach and restaurants - it's very private and nice gardens - the staff are friendly and the breakfast is good - the pool is fabulous and the room was clean and comfortable For us the bed was a bit hard and the breakfast menu was very limited
The room was very clean and comfortable, the shower was amazing and there was a good TV and AC.

The apartment I stayed in was great - clean, spacious and airy and light, with great facilities and a nice little balcony; the location is very good - on a side street in a bustling area and close to the tourist nightlife area as well as a nice park; the staff were pleasant and helpful - the girl came when I had an issue with the TV and she helped me organise a taxi to the airport when I was leaving and was responsive to my messages and the guy who met me to give me the keys was also very friendly and helpful...All in all I would definitely recommend this place in Ho Chi Minh...
The room was very clean and the bed comfortable.

sample_kept.review: Good hotel i have ever stayed in Vietnam, good pice , friendly staffs , nice room with lake view , i stayed in 3 nights with all of good felling , breakfast was delicious , many choices . i will be back soon .

This place was very nice. Our bedroom were clean and comfortable. The bathtub was great and something you won’t find in comparable hotels in the area. It is a just few minute walk to the center, but it’s very close and you are a bit removed from the noise. There are some great places to eat within a 5 minute walk. It’s a great place for a few days in Hanoi.

It was a amazing hotel. They helped very good at the reception. The lady kept smiling, even when our questions were a bit too much. Next to thay the rooms were very clean and got a room upgraded. In the end, a good option!

sample_rejected.review: everything is good ! they gave me warmest greeting ! i recommend this hotel extremly if you visit Hanoi. 모든 것이 좋았습니다 같은 가격에 방도 업그레이드 해주고, 늦은 시간에 체크인 했음에도 친절히 설명해주었습니다. 하노이에 간다면 이곳에 머무는 것을 추천합니다.

John He was good customer service and i had good experience this hotel. Room was clean and good location. Also right beside of there there is Catholic church. So you can bisit there to see how things go :) And John will teach you where you go! And fun place :) Thank you! 완전 좋은 경험 했습니다! 존이라는 친구를 찾아서 물어보세요! 어디로 가야 하는지 뭘 해야 하는지! 다 친절하게 알려줍니다!~ 호텔도 깨끗하고 좋았습니다

The location is very good, easy access to most of the places we wanted to go. Room was clean but my friend thinks the plugs were not very convenient for charging cellphones. Maybe the building is not designed for a hotel at the first place. The staff are all great and helpful indeed. They offered quite good prices when we wanted to book two more nights. Ms. Na was willing to explain things and showed her enthusiasm as a young employee. I think the hotel is run by a group of smart and hardworking young people. I would love to come back next time when visiting Hanoi. 地點佳，容易抵達老城區及還劍湖區。 工作人員年輕友善且樂意幫忙，Ms. Na. 是新員工，展現了極大的笑容與熱忱。對於年輕人來說非常可貴。 房間大小可接受，室內環境也算乾淨。早餐頗豐盛且味道不錯，看得出很用心。以小旅館來說非常值得肯定。 若有機會會願意再度造訪。

summary: The Essence was a wonderful place to stay for our trip to Hanoi!

I stayed here for 3 nights, and it was the best decision i ever made for a stay in Hanoi, from the time of our inquiries they responds very quickly, the transfer from airport to the hotel, the hotel staff they are all accommodating and exceeded our expectation our room was so clean and the bed was so comfy, they also so have the indigo spa which soothes our muscle pain after long day of tour , they greeted me and make my birthday more special, they offer day tours that fits to our length of stay, definitely will recommend to others and will sure be back soon and stay again at Acoustic Hotel and Spa.
My husband and I were staying in Hanoi for our honeymoon and we would have to say that the experience we had at this hotel was amazing.
